name: Landslide ROI Observation Mission
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist. A field report of an active landslide near Brienz requires rapid UAV reconnaissance. Read the operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/recon_brief.txt for coordinates and mission requirements. Create a QGroundControl mission plan at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/landslide_recon.plan that captures continuous video of the landslide. The mission must include a takeoff, a DO_SET_ROI command targeting the landslide center, an arc of observation and transit waypoints, loiter positions with exactly 2 turns each, and an RTL command.
